name: {number} Business Man Headshot Prompts
summary: Get professional business portraits without the expensive photographer. 📸 Our prompt book gives you the exact instructions to generate stunning, polished headshots using AI. Compatible with Gemini, Nano Banana, and Higgsfield. ⚡ Instant digital download.
description: This comprehensive Prompt Book contains {number} meticulously crafted AI prompts specifically designed to generate business man headshots that look authentic, professional, and boardroom-ready.
why: Professional headshots typically cost $300–$1,500. 😰 Professional photographers require scheduling, travel, and retakes. But what if you could generate studio-quality business portraits whenever you need them—in minutes, for pennies? ✨
prompt:
Urban business headshot of a male professional outdoors on a blurred city street background, natural daylight, shallow depth of field, approachable confident smile, modern corporate aesthetic
Outfit: dark blue suit, white shirt, striped tie
